prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-BAMBOOUTENSILSET-6PC-STD-FBA Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 6pc Bamboo Wooden Cooking Utensil Set with Holder Nonstick Safe Kitchen Tools, Dishwasher Safe Description: Bring function, utility and classic style to any kitchen with this bamboo wooden cooking utensil set with holder from Beille. Designed for everyday cooking, this six piece set includes essential wooden cooking utensils that make stirring, serving and meal prep effortless, while keeping your countertop organized and clutter free.

The set includes five kitchen tools: a solid bamboo spatula, two solid bamboo cooking spoons, and two slotted bamboo cooking spoons, along with a matching bamboo utensil holder for convenient storage and easy access.

Crafted from durable, renewable bamboo, these wooden cooking utensils are non scratch and safe for nonstick cookware, making them ideal for everyday stovetop use. The non scratch surface is safe for use with nonstick cookware, helping protect your pots and pans while cooking.

The clean, classic design pairs seamlessly with a wide range of kitchen styles, from modern farmhouse to minimalist spaces, making it a versatile addition to any home. The included holder keeps utensils upright, visible and always within reach for efficient cooking.

These wooden cooking utensils are safe for nonstick cookware and help prevent scratches while offering lightweight control for stirring, serving, sautéing, and every day cooking. This set is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup, though hand washing is highly recommended to help preserve the natural finish and extend the life of kitchen utensils over time. Search Terms: Wooden cooking utensils nonstick safe scratch free kitchen utensil holder countertop organizer wood spatula spoon set eco friendly natural cooking tools bamboo wooden spoon rest alternative heat resistant serve stir mix saute farmhouse kitchen decor Features: - WOODEN COOKING UTENSIL SET WITH HOLDER: Complete 5 piece bamboo utensil set includes essential cooking tools plus a matching countertop utensil holder for organized, clutter free kitchens - NONSTICK SAFE AND SCRATCH FREE DESIGN: Smooth bamboo construction is gentle on cookware, making these wooden utensils safe for nonstick pans and everyday stovetop cooking - EASY COUNTERTOP ORGANIZATION: Keep kitchen countertops neat and functional with included bamboo holder; container keeps kitchen utensils upright, easy to identify and quickly within reach when cooking - NATURAL BAMBOO DURABILITY: Made from renewable bamboo sources, these kitchen utensils feature 100% bamboo construction that resists warping and cracking; ideal for stirring sauteing mixing and serving, this set supports a wide range of kitchen cooking tasks with ease - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 3.0 inches; Weight: 0.72lbs; Material: Renewable Bamboo; Dishwasher Safe: Yes, however hand washing is recommended === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
